attempt: Transfer TICKET47's rule: a bounded state memory that closes on a positive-pressure lasso cannot be used as a proof object. Either prove the lasso is unreachable in the real system or use a stronger invariant whose state does not merely remember a bounded suffix.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: bounded cutoff ledger memory that repeats on an exceptional-residue margin lasso
bounded_result.retained_target: A cutoff-independent margin automaton proves every exceptional-residue lasso has positive representation margin.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: an exceptional-residue lasso whose margin debt repeats with every bounded ledger memory

obstruction: The transfer is a proof-search discipline rather than a theorem for the target problem. It blocks periodic finite-memory repairs but leaves the infinite bridge open.
candidate_theorem: A cutoff-independent margin automaton proves every exceptional-residue lasso has positive representation margin.
next_experiment: Search for residue-margin lassos before accepting any bounded-memory cutoff ledger.
claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.
